title: rubus × castriferrei
intro: Rubus × castriferrei, also known as the wild black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family, specifically a cross between Rubus armeniacus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × castriferrei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × castriferrei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine and herbalism.
